title: Booking Concert Tickets in Groups
description:
A concert hall has n rows numbered from 0 to n - 1, each with m seats, numbered from 0 to m - 1. You need to design a ticketing system that can allocate seats in the following cases:
Note that the spectators are very picky. Hence:
Implement the BookMyShow class:
Example 1:
Constraints:
constraints: At most 5 * 104 calls in total will be made to gather and scatter.
hints: Since seats are allocated by smallest row and then by smallest seat numbers, how can we keep a record of the smallest seat number vacant in each row?
How can range max query help us to check if contiguous seats can be allocated in a range?
Similarly, can range sum query help us to check if enough seats are available in a range?
Which data structure can be used to implement the above?
